infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to capture receipt images for expense tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photos to select receipt images and browse recent captures.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app saves receipt photos to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Fox Valley Finance to access your camera to capture receipts.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Fox Valley Finance to access your photos to select receipts.
Allow Fox Valley Finance to access your photos to browse recent receipts.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Fox Valley Finance to save receipt photos to your library.
